title: Das Liebeskarussell
director: Rolf Thiele, Axel von Ambesser, Alfred Weidenmann
writer: Paul Hengge, Kurt Nachmann, Herbert Reinecker
actors: Curd Jürgens, Nadja Tiller, Ivan Desny
plot: An episodic film, telling four erotic tales: Angela isn't sexually satisfied by her husband, so she simulates sleep-walking to visit her neighbor across the street every night; when his bathtub runs over, shy Peter gets to meet hi...
